channel.title: ClawPipe Blog & Changelog
channel.description: Engineering deep-dives, release notes, and customer stories from ClawPipe — the only AI gateway that skips LLM calls.

item.title: v3.7.0 — Provider failover, webhook DLQ, OpenAPI self-discovery, 90%+ coverage
item.description: SDK gains a provider failover chain with per-router health tracking. Gateway gains 11 features: Idempotency-Key, RFC 9239 RateLimit headers, W3C Trace Context, Webhook DLQ + retry, SSE Last-Event-ID resume, self-served OpenAPI 3.1, public stats endpoint, per-project savings, free-tier attribution, D1 read replication, KV cache warming. Test coverage on the gateway moves from 39% line / 74% branch to 90.15% line / 85.85% branch — both /CLAUDE.md gates now pass. Vitest bumped to 3.2.4 across all packages, clearing all dev-dep audit findings.

item.title: How to use ClawPipe — 5-minute setup
item.description: Install the SDK, generate an API key, route your first prompt. Includes the OpenAI-compat shim for drop-in migrations from existing OpenAI client code.
